hook_copy: Wait, soda that's actually good for your gut?
description: A 20-something woman in a sunlit kitchen cracks open a Strawberry Vanilla Olipop, reacts to the taste, and flashes a 20%-off code over the can on a retro yellow background.

insights.text: UGC kitchen reactions are outperforming studio shots 2.8 times ROAS this week.
